name: manya
author: Uviwe Menyiwe (Azura Daemon), HAEL Foundation
description: Manya parent repository for sites, tools, packages, and models.

scripts.tools:test: npm run hawk:test && npm run forge:test && npm run stamp:test && npm run vault:test && npm run lens:test && npm run shield:test && npm run signal:test && npm run pulse:test && npm run primary-sector:test && npm run cybersecurity:test && npm run transport-logistics:test && npm run research-academic:test && npm run unify:test && npm run cli:test && npm run lycon:test && npm run upmp:test
scripts.packages:test: npm run packages:test:core && npm run packages:test:composed && npm run packages:test:merged
scripts.packages:test:core: npm --workspace @manya/toolkit test && npm --workspace @manya/helixflow-sdk test && npm --workspace @manya/craft-engine test
scripts.packages:test:composed: npm run keyring:test && npm run attest:test && npm run ledger:test && npm run anonymize:test && npm run memory:test && npm run cortex:test && npm run perception:test && npm run telepathy:test && npm run reflection:test && npm run economy:test && npm run guardian:test
scripts.packages:test:merged: npm run constitution:test && npm run contracts:test && npm run council:test && npm run customs-shield:test && npm run nervous-system:test && npm run weave:test
scripts.test:all: npm run packages:test && npm run tools:test && npm run test:7x7
